name: Profile/settings hub expansion for membership overview and user preferences
description: Expand the current profile-only settings surface into a small but meaningful settings hub that better matches the product intent. This feature should keep the existing avatar/display-name path intact while adding the missing account-management context around household memberships, navigational shortcuts to household-specific actions, and a pragmatic MVP layer of user preferences where appropriate. The purpose is not to build a massive settings platform, but to close the gap where Settings exists in navigation yet behaves like a narrowly scoped profile form rather than a reliable user-control center.
evidence: Active ExecPlan: docs/exec-plans/plans/2026-05-07-feat-041-settings-hub-expansion.md; Implemented settings hub UI in apps/web/src/views/app/profile-settings-page.tsx with focused coverage in apps/web/src/views/app/profile-settings-page.test.tsx; Verification: pnpm --filter web test -- --run src/views/app/profile-settings-page.test.tsx; pnpm --filter web typecheck; pnpm --filter web lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in apps/web/src/components/expense/category-picker.tsx)
